title: psychotria conica subsp. conica
intro: Psychotria conica subsp. conica is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as a medicinal plant used in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized and its health benefits to be experienced.
